description: In dieser Episode beleuchten wir AMDs herausragende Finanzergebnisse für das vierte Quartal und das Gesamtjahr 2025, in denen das Unternehmen einen Rekordjahresumsatz von 34,6 Milliarden US-Dollar erzielte. title: AI in Orbit: SpaceX‑xAI, Paris Raid, AMD Earnings
description: SpaceX folds xAI into its orbit at a $1.25T valuation as Paris prosecutors raid X over alleged AI deepfakes. We break down AMD’s earnings setup, Congress’s workplace AI hearing, and Cisco’s AI Summit — plus what to watch next.

title: Options Corner: AMD Earnings Trade
description: AMD Inc. (AMD) earnings are set to report following Tuesday's close. Rick Ducat compares the semiconductor name to its peers to show its outperformance in the past 52-weeks. He notes $203 as a recent support level should shares dip after the earnings report, but notes that share price continues to stay above the stock's moving average studies. description:
Send us Fan Mail
This episode provides an overview of Wall Street's generally optimistic outlook on Advanced Micro Devices' (AMD) upcoming Q3 2025 earnings report, scheduled for early November. description: In this episode, Ben Bajarin and Jay Goldberg discuss the latest earnings from AMD, highlighting their strong performance amidst market fluctuations and concerns about competition in the AI space.
